brief.para: Multi-vector single-precision convert to interleaved 8-bit floating-point

authored.para: This instruction converts each single-precision element of the four source vectors to 8-bit floating-point while scaling the value by 2SInt(FPMR.NSCALE), and places the four-way interleaved results in the quarter-width elements of the destination vector. The 8-bit floating-point encoding format is selected by FPMR.F8D.

a.hover: Is the name of the destination scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zd" field.
For the "Four registers" variant: is the name of the first scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 4.
Is the name of the fourth scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 4 plus 3.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_multi_sve_4.mortlach_multi4_narrow_fp8_cvrt.fcvtn_z8_mz4_

intro.para: Is the name of the destination scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zd" field.
Is the name of the first scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 4.
Is the name of the fourth scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 4 plus 3.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_multi_sve_4.mortlach_multi4_narrow_fp8_cvrt.fcvtn_z8_mz4_
